headline: Bank of America Securities Reiterates Buy Rating on Capital One Financial (COF) Stock
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in May. On April 21, Mihir Bhatia from Bank of America Securities reiterated a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, with a price objective of $234.00. The analyst’s rating was backed by several factors, which emphasize that the earnings miss for Q1 2026 does […]
